Name: Chris Smith
Comment: This submission includes internal variability in surface temperature enabled.

Name: Chris Smith
Comment: In the time axis, concentrations, forcing, temperature, heat content and energy variables are interpolcated from "timebounds", which are the edge of year boundaries, to "timepoints", which are half-year values. Emissions are given on "timepoints".  The time axis metadata (days or hours since 1750-01-01) is strictly correct but for analysis it is likely the user will round down for visualisation. The interpolation may also result in internal variability being over-smoothed compared to the native model output.
Scenario: all runs that include concentration-driven greenhouse gas pathways (idealised or scenario)
